test_cases.scenario: Verify user can login with valid credentials
steps: Enter username from environment variable LOGIN_USERNAME
Enter password from environment variable LOGIN_PASSWORD
test_cases.expected_result: User should be redirected to the dashboard

test_cases.scenario: Verify error message is displayed for invalid password
steps: Enter username from environment variable LOGIN_USERNAME
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify login fails when username field is empty
steps: Enter password from environment variable LOGIN_PASSWORD
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Username is required' is displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify user dashboard loads successfully after login
test_cases.expected_result: Dashboard loads successfully and displays user information

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can search for products using search bar
steps: Enter search term in search bar
test_cases.expected_result: Search results for the product are displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can filter products by price range
steps: Select price range from filter options
test_cases.expected_result: Products within the selected price range are displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can filter products by category
test_cases.expected_result: Products within the selected category are displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can view product details
steps: Select a product from the product list
test_cases.expected_result: Product details page is displayed with correct information

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can add product to cart
steps: Select a product from the product list
test_cases.expected_result: Product is successfully added to the cart

test_cases.scenario: Verify that cart shows items added by user
preconditions: User has added products to the cart
test_cases.expected_result: Cart displays the added items

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can remove an item from the cart
preconditions: User has items in the cart
steps: Click remove button on an item
test_cases.expected_result: Item is successfully removed from the cart

test_cases.scenario: Verify the total price is correctly calculated in the cart
preconditions: User has added products to the cart
test_cases.expected_result: Total price reflects the sum of all items in the cart

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can proceed to checkout from the cart
preconditions: User has added products to the cart
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the checkout page

test_cases.scenario: Verify checkout page is displayed when proceeding from cart
preconditions: User has products in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: Checkout page loads successfully

test_cases.scenario: Verify error message is displayed for invalid billing address fields
preconditions: User is on the checkout page
steps: Fill in billing address with invalid data
test_cases.expected_result: Error message for invalid billing address fields is displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can successfully complete a payment
preconditions: User is on the checkout page
test_cases.expected_result: Payment is successfully completed

test_cases.scenario: Verify order summary displays correct order details after payment
preconditions: User has successfully completed a payment
test_cases.expected_result: Order summary displays correct order details

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can view past orders in order history
test_cases.expected_result: Past orders are displayed in the order history

test_cases.scenario: Verify user can filter past orders by status
preconditions: User is on the order history page
steps: Select order status from filter options
test_cases.expected_result: Past orders are displayed based on the selected status

test_cases.scenario: Verify error message is displayed when there are no orders to show
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'No orders to show' is displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify empty cart state shows correct message and icon
preconditions: User has no items in the cart
test_cases.expected_result: Correct empty cart message and icon is displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify pagination works correctly for product listings
test_cases.expected_result: Next page of products is displayed

test_cases.scenario: Verify continue to payment button is disabled with invalid form
preconditions: User is on the checkout page
test_cases.expected_result: Continue to payment button is disabled

test_cases.scenario: Verify user is redirected back to cart when clicking 'Back to Cart'
preconditions: User is on the checkout page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected back to the cart page
